units.content: system receives empirical-distribution characterization of measurement values for a target entity from its stored history
system selects one uncertainty-propagation method from a plurality based on the empirical-distribution characterization received
first method assumes approximately Gaussian distributions of measurement error
second method is robust to heavy-tailed or multi-modal distributions as distinct from Gaussian case
selection of uncertainty-propagation method is recorded in the append-only event log as a typed annotation
